mapper.sql: WITH TARGET_METER AS ( SELECT X.HO_NO, X.DONG_NO, X.DONG_NM, X.HO, X.DISPLAY_DONG_HO, X.FACILITY_NO, X.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO, X.BILL_ITEM_CD, X.BILL_ITEM_NM FROM ( SELECT M.HO_NO, U.DONG_NO, U.DONG_NM, H.HO, U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO, M.FACILITY_NO, M.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO, F.FACILITY_TY_CD AS BILL_ITEM_CD, CASE F.FACILITY_TY_CD WHEN 'ELC' THEN '전기요금' WHEN 'WTR' THEN '수도요금' WHEN 'GAS' THEN '가스요금' END AS BILL_ITEM_NM, /* 수정: 과거/현재 공급업체가 함께 있어도 세대 + 항목 기준으로 선택월 우선 1건만 화면 대상으로 사용 */ ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY M.HO_NO, F.FACILITY_TY_CD ORDER BY CASE WHEN M.METER_DT >= TO_DATE(#{searchVO.billYm} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.METER_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{searchVO.billYm} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), 1) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, M.METER_DT DESC, M.METER_HSTRY_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM METER_HSTRY M JOIN FACILITY F ON M.FACILITY_NO = F.FACILITY_NO JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON M.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO JOIN UTILITY_PROVIDER UP ON M.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO = UP.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO AND UP.APT_CMPLEX_NO = U.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{searchVO.aptCmplexNo} AND F.FACILITY_TY_CD IN ('ELC', 'WTR', 'GAS') ) X WHERE X.RN = 1 ), PREV_METER AS ( SELECT M.HO_NO, M.FACILITY_NO, M.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO, M.CURR_VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY M.HO_NO, M.FACILITY_NO, M.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO ORDER BY M.METER_DT DESC, M.METER_HSTRY_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM METER_HSTRY M JOIN TARGET_METER T ON M.HO_NO = T.HO_NO AND M.FACILITY_NO = T.FACILITY_NO AND M.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO = T.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO WHERE M.METER_DT < TO_DATE(#{searchVO.billYm} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD') ), CURR_METER AS ( SELECT M.METER_HSTRY_NO, M.HO_NO, M.FACILITY_NO, M.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO, M.METER_DT, M.CURR_VAL, M.METER_CN, M.METER_RSLT_CD, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY M.HO_NO, M.FACILITY_NO, M.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO ORDER BY M.METER_DT DESC, M.METER_HSTRY_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM METER_HSTRY M JOIN TARGET_METER T ON M.HO_NO = T.HO_NO AND M.FACILITY_NO = T.FACILITY_NO AND M.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO = T.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO WHERE M.METER_DT >= TO_DATE(#{searchVO.billYm} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD') AND M.METER_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{searchVO.billYm} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), 1) ), METER_BASE AS ( SELECT T.HO_NO, T.DONG_NO, T.DONG_NM, T.HO, T.DISPLAY_DONG_HO, C.METER_HSTRY_NO, T.FACILITY_NO, T.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO, C.METER_DT, NVL(P.CURR_VAL, 0) AS PRE_VAL, C.CURR_VAL, CASE WHEN C.CURR_VAL IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE C.CURR_VAL - NVL(P.CURR_VAL, 0) END AS USAGE_VAL, C.METER_CN, C.METER_RSLT_CD, T.BILL_ITEM_CD, T.BILL_ITEM_NM FROM TARGET_METER T LEFT JOIN PREV_METER P ON T.HO_NO = P.HO_NO AND T.FACILITY_NO = P.FACILITY_NO AND T.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO = P.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO AND P.RN = 1 LEFT JOIN CURR_METER C ON T.HO_NO = C.HO_NO AND T.FACILITY_NO = C.FACILITY_NO AND T.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO = C.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO AND C.RN = 1 )

WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( B.DISPLAY_DONG_HO LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.keyword} || '%' OR B.DONG_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.keyword} || '%' OR B.HO LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.keyword} || '%' )
mapper.select:
SELECT B.* FROM METER_BASE B
ORDER BY B.DONG_NM, B.HO, B.BILL_ITEM_CD

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT B.HO_NO) FROM METER_BASE B WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( B.DISPLAY_DONG_HO LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.keyword} || '%' OR B.DONG_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.keyword} || '%' OR B.HO LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.keyword} || '%' )

SELECT B.BILL_ITEM_CD, MAX(B.BILL_ITEM_NM) AS BILL_ITEM_NM, SUM(NVL(B.USAGE_VAL, 0)) AS USAGE_VAL, COUNT(*) AS ROW_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN B.CURR_VAL IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ENTERED_COUNT FROM METER_BASE B
GROUP BY B.BILL_ITEM_CD
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO METER_HSTRY T USING ( SELECT #{meter.hoNo} AS HO_NO, #{meter.utilityProviderNo} AS UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO, #{meter.facilityNo} AS FACILITY_NO, LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{billYm} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD')) AS METER_DT, #{meter.preVal} AS PRE_VAL, #{meter.currVal} AS CURR_VAL, #{meter.meterCn} AS METER_CN, #{meter.meterRsltCd} AS METER_RSLT_CD FROM DUAL ) S ON ( T.HO_NO = S.HO_NO AND T.FACILITY_NO = S.FACILITY_NO AND T.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO = S.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO AND TO_CHAR(T.METER_DT, 'YYYYMM') = #{billYm} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.PRE_VAL = S.PRE_VAL, T.CURR_VAL = S.CURR_VAL, T.METER_CN = S.METER_CN, T.METER_RSLT_CD = S.METER_RSLT_CD, T.MDF_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( METER_HSTRY_NO, HO_NO, UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO, FACILITY_NO, METER_DT, PRE_VAL, CURR_VAL, METER_CN, METER_RSLT_CD, REG_DT, MDF_DT ) VALUES ( 'MH' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_METER_HSTRY.NEXTVAL, 7, '0'), S.HO_NO, S.UTILITY_PROVIDER_NO, S.FACILITY_NO, S.METER_DT, S.PRE_VAL, S.CURR_VAL, S.METER_CN, S.METER_RSLT_CD, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
